name: Bastille Day
traditions: Military parade on Champs-Élysées; Eiffel Tower fireworks; firefighters' balls (Bals des Pompiers); community dances; picnics.
historicalBackground: Bastille Day commemorates the storming of the Bastille prison on July 14, 1789 — the symbolic start of the French Revolution.
description: France's national day celebrating the French Revolution, with a spectacular military parade and Eiffel Tower fireworks.
